jobs.title: Warehouse and material manager for the machine shop, Lahti
jobs.meta_description: Looking for a Warehouse and material manager for the machine shop, Lahti job in Lahti?
jobs.description: Visio Henkilöstöratkaisut Päijät-Häme Oy is seeking a warehouse and material manager for their machine shop in Lahti. The client is looking for a self-starter and energetic worker to manage the material flows and order of the machine shop, ensuring smooth production. The company realizes that its customers combine steel structures, welding, machine shop manufacturing, and installation, service, and maintenance work under the same roof. The job description includes duties such as receiving and inspecting goods, shelving materials, collecting materials for projects, monitoring inventory balances, reporting replenishment needs, internal logistics, transfers of goods, exports and searches of goods/materials if necessary, preparation and packaging of shipments, maintaining the order and
what_we_expect: Experience in warehouse work (working in a machine shop is considered an advantage)
Forklift driving skills are considered an advantage
You are organized and keep places clean
job_responsibilities: Shelving of materials and warehouse management
Collection of materials for projects and delivery to production
Monitoring inventory balances and reporting replenishment needs
Internal logistics and transfers of goods
Exports and searches of goods/materials if necessary
what_we_offer: Salary determined according to your skills TES Technology Industry / Hourly wage €14/h
The opportunity to develop your professional skills
